title: dichromena globosa
intro: Dichromena globosa, also known as the yellow eyed-grass, is a perennial plant native to the southeastern United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant contains compounds with expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to relieve congestion and soothe irritated tissues, providing health benefits such as improved breathing and reduced inflammation. In herbal preparations, Dichromena globosa is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
